message:
feat(fwc): add unified event stream tailing module (bead qnchs.8.1)

Adds event_stream.rs with ConnectorEvent (TOON + JSON formatting),
EventBuffer (ring buffer with backpressure), TailConfig/TailPlan,
StreamStatus, ConnectorStreamState, TailSummary, and parse_since()
for human-readable durations. Wired into CLI as `fwc events` (alias `tail`)
with --all, --since, --buffer-size flags.

- 50 unit tests + events_dispatch integration
- Also fixed credential_store.rs doc_markdown and cast_possible_truncation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
